text: Jimmy Carr broke my brain with this one.

I think a lot of the discontent comes
from the judgment people have about what

prescription for what they should do. So
I describe my life and then people think
I'm prescribing what they should do. And

want to do. Real quick, if you're a

little kind of quiz thing where if you
